name: Old Dominion Freight Line
analysis: Price making higher highs and higher lows — healthy uptrend structure. Price has pulled back and is testing the 55 EMA at $216.4132. This is a core Fibonacci pullback to a key trend EMA. Trade setup: entry $216.4132, stop $209.8022, target $221.3494. Risk/reward is 0.75:1. Weekly EMAs are bullish.
